sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66487" key="meso/ptwta" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεσό-πτωτα</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀνόματα</foreign> words <sense id="n66487.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">inflected in the middle</tr_>, e. g. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">quisque</tr_> or <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τίσποτε</foreign>, Dosith.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0545.tlg001:p.405" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.405</biblScope> </bibl> K.</sense> </entryFree>
